name: Lindsay Australia Limited
analysis: LAU has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.5900, stop A$0.5247, target A$0.6660 (1.16:1) — then trail it.
